key.name: tray-pos
key.description: Set where the Icon tray should appear in Gnome tray

key.name: tray-order
key.description: Set where the Icon tray should appear among other trays

key.name: custom-icons
key.description: Replace any icons with custom icons from themes

key.name: hidden-indicators
key.description: Unique IDs of indicators to keep hidden from the panel

key.name: indicator-order
key.description: Ordered list of indicator unique IDs controlling their left-to-right position in the panel

key.name: click-overrides
key.description: Per-indicator override to always open the menu on left-click instead of activating the app

key.name: group-overflow-enabled
key.description: Collapse AppIndicator/KStatusNotifierItem indicators beyond the overflow threshold into a single panel menu

key.name: group-overflow-threshold
key.description: Number of indicators (by stored order) to show directly in the panel before grouping the rest

key.name: quick-settings-enabled
key.description: Show a small mirrored icon for each indicator inside the Quick Settings menu, in addition to the panel. No-ops if unsupported on the running Shell version

key.name: icon-color-overrides
key.description: Recolor specific indicators to a solid "#rrggbb" color; forces full desaturation first

key.name: icon-opacity-overrides
key.description: Override the global opacity (0-255) for specific indicators

key.name: icon-size-overrides
key.description: Override the global icon size in pixels for specific indicators

key.name: icon-saturation-overrides
key.description: Override the global desaturation factor (0.0-1.0) for specific indicators

key.name: icon-brightness-overrides
key.description: Override the global brightness (-1.0-1.0) for specific indicators

key.name: icon-contrast-overrides
key.description: Override the global contrast (-1.0-1.0) for specific indicators

key.name: auto-recolor-enabled
key.description: Automatically tint indicators without a manual color override for contrast against the current panel background

key.name: indicator-names
key.description: Human-readable name recorded for each indicator unique ID, for display in preferences only
